astdump.name: demo
demo_2
astdump.translated: Program { statements: [ Viz( VizStatement { target: Relation( RelationRef { name: [ Name( "foo", ), ], inherit: true, alias: None, }, ), component_type: Some( SPEC, ), type_modifiers: 0, extra: Some( Object( [ DsonField { key: Known( DSON_POSITION, ), value: Object( [ DsonField { key: Known( DSON_ROW, ), value: Expression( LiteralInteger( "0", ), ), }, DsonField { key: Known( DSON_COLUMN, ), value: Expression( LiteralInteger( "0", ), ), }, DsonField { key: Known( DSON_WIDTH, ), value: Expression( LiteralInteger( "6", ), ), }, DsonField { key: Known( DSON_HEIGHT, ), value: Expression( LiteralInteger( "4", ), ), }, ], ), }, DsonField { key: Known( DSON_TITLE, ), value: Expression( LiteralString( "Line Chart", ), ), }, DsonField { key: Known( DSON_ENCODING, ), value: Object( [ DsonField { key: Known( DSON_X, ), value: Object( [ DsonField { key: Known( DSON_AXIS, ), value: Object( [ DsonField { key: Known( DSON_TICK_COUNT, ), value: Expression( LiteralInteger( "10", ), ), }, ], ), }, DsonField { key: Known( DSON_FIELD, ), value: Expression( LiteralString( "x", ), ), }, ], ), }, DsonField { key: Known( DSON_Y, ), value: Object( [ DsonField { key: Known( DSON_AXIS, ), value: Object( [ DsonField { key: Known( DSON_TICK_COUNT, ), value: Expression( LiteralInteger( "10", ), ), }, ], ), }, DsonField { key: Known( DSON_FIELD, ), value: Expression( LiteralString( "y", ), ), }, ], ), }, ], ), }, DsonField { key: Known( DSON_MARK, ), value: Expression( LiteralString( "line", ), ), }, ], ), ), }, ), ], }
